note: Stabilizing the delta-contrastive (Exp 13). Seed variance + two-stage freeze + prediction/contrastive rebalance. All LABEL-FREE, random-position toy, hires_proj + delta + counterfactuals, K=6.

two_stage_freeze.note: freezing the encoder did NOT clean action_err — degradation is in the dynamics

predw10_seed_sweep.note: rebalance reliably cleans action_err (~0.25 all seeds) but NMI still high-variance; mean ~0.4

best_balanced: predw10: NMI 0.70, position-NMI 0.03, action_err 0.30 (clean rep) — but no-action gap ~0.006 (dynamics weakly action-conditional)
conclusion: Label-free discovery is demonstrably possible (best 0.70-0.785, past the 0.62 control) but INTRINSICALLY HIGH-VARIANCE on this toy (0.2-0.78); no config removes the variance. Clean rep and high NMI trade off (small action-effect). Next: a structural prior (cycle/inverse-consistency) for variance, or a harder toy with a larger action-effect.
